prompt.name: Weather Card
prompt.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
prompt.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.sourceCode:
import { useState } from 'react'; import { Card, Stack, Text, Row } from '@ggui-ai/design/primitives'; interface ForecastItem { day: string; icon: string; high: number; low: number; } interface Props { city: string; temperature: number; condition: string; humidity: number; windSpeed: number; unit: string; forecast: Array<{ day: string; icon: string; high: number; low: number }>; } export default function WeatherCard({ city, temperature, condition, humidity, windSpeed, unit, forecast, }: Props) { return ( {/* Header: City and Current Condition */} {city} {/* Main Temperature Display */}
{temperature}°{unit}
{condition}
{condition === '☀️' ? 'Sunny' : condition === '☁️' ? 'Cloudy' : condition === '🌧️' ? 'Rainy' : condition === '⛅' ? 'Partly Cloudy' : condition === '❄️' ? 'Snowy' : 'Clear'} {/* Divider */}
{/* Humidity and Wind Speed */}
💧
Humidity {humidity}%
💨
Wind Speed {windSpeed} {unit === 'C' ? 'km/h' : 'mph'} {/* Divider */}
{/* 5-Day Forecast Strip */} 5-Day Forecast {forecast && forecast.length > 0 ? ( forecast.map((day, index) => (
{day.day}
{day.icon}
{day.high}° {day.low}°
)) ) : ( No forecast data available )} ); }

violations: Hardcoded string "Sunny" found — should be a prop default
